name: sinabro-cm6-build
description: Build inputs for the vendored CodeMirror-6 bundle (apps/desktop/ui/vendor/codemirror.bundle.js). fetch-once-then-vendor: npm install once, esbuild to an IIFE, commit the bundle. The runtime loads ONLY the local bundle — no CDN/network. This dir lives OUTSIDE frontendDist (../ui) so node_modules is never served.
